Title Infringement - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags

Enclosed AUT DOC 21 - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags.pdf
Felix Holter Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 21 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  26 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:25 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 10, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 2 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 5 16  Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 17:08:26 1:29.491 
2 5 44  Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 17:08:30 OUT LAP 
 
 
Decision Deletion of the lap times shown.
